title: Magna Mining Announces Graduation to the Toronto Stock Exchange and Results of Annual & Special Meeting of Shareholders
description: SUDBURY, Ontario, June 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Magna Mining Inc. (TSXV: NICU) (OTCQX: MGMNF) (FSE: 8YD) (“Magna” or the “Company”) is pleased to announce that it will be graduating from the TSX Venture Exchange ("TSXV") to the Toronto Stock Exchange (the "TSX"). The Common Shares will begin trading on the TSX at market open on Tuesday, June 23, 2026 and will continue to trade under the current stock symbol, “NICU”.
